title: Add AI Image Studio to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Client-side canvas
gist.blurb: AI Image Studio just sprouted in the greenhouse. It's a web terminal that generates photorealistic images entirely client-side, meaning your pixels are for your eyes only.
gist.summary: Added AI Image Studio to the community app directory, highlighting its client-side, zero-retention image generation capabilities.
gist.impact: Users can now explore a new privacy-focused tool in the ecosystem that renders AI images entirely within their local browser environment.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as an artist in a digital studio. Since it's a 'web terminal' that generates images, a retro computer printing out a physical photo fits perfectly.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, pulling a freshly printed photograph out of a retro computer terminal. The terminal screen glows with soft lime green (#ecf874) code. Soft lavender and peach gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, pulling a freshly printed photograph out of a retro computer terminal. The terminal screen glows with soft lime green (#ecf874) code. Soft lavender and peach gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
